name: Kelly 28 leather handbag
description:
Hermes Kelly Sellier 28 In Bleu Indigo Epsom With Gold Hardware Y Stamp

From 2020 (purchased August 2021), this classic handbag is absolutely stunning. It is crafted of Epsom leather in Bleu Indigo, a deep rich navy that borders on black, and features a leather top handle, an optional shoulder strap, and gold-plated hardware. The flap opens to a matching goatskin leather interior with zipper and patch pockets.

This preloved Kelly 28 is in very good condition. It has beautiful structure, protective film on all hardware with the exception of the shoulder strap and there are no visible scuffs. Photos were taken in different light to show color variation.

There are some creases on the back where the flap opens which are more prevalent on the right side. There are normal soft impressions in the interior and the shoulder strap has a “twist” or kink in it which appears to be from storage. There are very fine scratches on the hardware without film and some tarnishing on the plaque rivets, as well. The corners are super clean as is the interior.

Comes with removable shoulder strap, box (has wear), all dust bags, lock and keys, clochette, protective felt, care book and original receipt
